findings.message:
Hardcoded model name: 'TranslationFlow - Language Detection, Translation, and Intent Classification.

This flow translates user input to English and classifies intent as either
'generate_component' or 'question'.

Usage:
    from langflow.agentic.flows.translation_flow import get_graph
    graph = await get_graph(provider="OpenAI", model_name="gpt-4o-mini")
' — no routing/fallback
findings.remediation: Use model routing or configuration instead of hardcoded names

findings.message:
Hardcoded model name: 'Create and return the TranslationFlow graph.

    Args:
        provider: Model provider (e.g., "OpenAI", "Anthropic"). Defaults to OpenAI.
        model_name: Model name (e.g., "gpt-4o-mini"). Defaults to gpt-4o-mini.
        api_key_var: Optional API key variable name (e.g., "OPENAI_API_KEY").

    Returns:
        Graph: The configured translation flow graph.
    ' — no routing/fallback
findings.remediation: Use model routing or configuration instead of hardcoded names

findings.message:
Hardcoded model name: 'Inject model configuration into the flow's Agent component.

    Args:
        flow_data: The flow JSON as a dict
        provider: The provider name (e.g., "OpenAI", "Anthropic")
        model_name: The model name (e.g., "gpt-4o", "claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929")
        api_key_var: Optional API key variable name. If not provided, uses provider's default.

    Returns:
        Modified flow data with the model configuration injected

    Raises:
        ValueError: If provider is unknown
    ' — no routing/fallback
findings.remediation: Use model routing or configuration instead of hardcoded names

findings.message:
Hardcoded model name: 'Load a Graph from a Python flow file.

    The Python file must define a function `get_graph()` that returns a Graph.
    The function can optionally accept provider, model_name, and api_key_var parameters.

    Args:
        flow_path: Path to the Python flow file.
        provider: Optional model provider (e.g., "OpenAI").
        model_name: Optional model name (e.g., "gpt-4o-mini").
        api_key_var: Optional API key variable name.

    Returns:
        Graph: The loaded and configured graph.

    Raises:
        HTTPException: If the flow file cannot be loaded or executed.
    ' — no routing/fallback
findings.remediation: Use model routing or configuration instead of hardcoded names

Hardcoded model name: 'Format a span name following the OTel semantic convention ``"{operation} {model}"``.

        Args:
            operation: Human-readable operation name (e.g. ``"ChatOpenAI"``).
            model_name: Optional model identifier (e.g. ``"gpt-4o"``).

        Returns:
            ``"{operation} {model_name}"`` when model is known, otherwise just
            ``operation``.
        ' — no routing/fallback
findings.remediation: Use model routing or configuration instead of hardcoded names

findings.message: No content injection defense — hidden HTML/CSS/zero-width instructions pass to agents undetected. (86% attack success rate)
findings.remediation: Deploy trap defense layer on tool results

findings.message: No RAG poisoning protection — knowledge base documents not scanned for embedded instructions. (<0.1% contamination = >80% attack success)
findings.remediation: Deploy trap defense layer on tool results

findings.message: No behavioral trap detection — post-execution behavioral changes not monitored. (10/10 M365 Copilot attacks succeeded)
findings.remediation: Deploy trap defense layer on tool results

findings.message: No approval integrity verification -- agent summaries for approval not cross-checked against actual actions. (Approval fatigue exploitation)
findings.remediation: Deploy trap defense layer on tool results

findings.message: No adversarial testing evidence — no red team, no prompt injection tests
findings.remediation: Implement adversarial testing for agent systems

findings.message: No tool-call attack simulation — agent tool calls not tested against adversarial inputs
findings.remediation: Implement adversarial testing for agent systems

findings.message: No multi-agent chaos engineering — agent swarms not stress tested
findings.remediation: Implement adversarial testing for agent systems

trap_defense.deepmind_citation: Franklin, Tomašev, Jacobs, Leibo, Osindero. "AI Agent Traps." Google DeepMind, March 2026.
